title: sideritis hirsuta subsp. maritima
intro: Sideritis hirsuta subsp. maritima, also known as Mediterranean mountain tea, is a subspecies of the Sideritis hirsuta plant, a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Sideritis hirsuta subsp. maritima include reducing inflammation and improving respiratory issues, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer and cardiovascular protective effects. The plant is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and can also be found in capsule or tincture form, making it a popular natural remedy for various health concerns.
